evidence: V identifies his genuine interest in solving problems—no matter how small—as his superpower.
V shares his personal journey of overcoming networking anxiety by realizing he had to "make shit happen out of thin air" for his team.
Alex (acting as a founder coach) notes that founders often feel "ashamed" to ask for what they truly want (e.g., specific vibes or high-performance traits) while also feeling performative pressure.
Celia's Connexions solves professional isolation for remote/freelance young professionals through reciprocity-based networking and in-person events.
V posits that the way one seeks a job reflects their level of intrinsic agency.
